title: Child Development Master Program Mission and Vision
content:
Child Development Master Program Mission and Vision

Mission:

The mission in order to be able to respond to the developing needs of the society in the field of child development is to educate competent professionals who will be able to carry out scientific researches and practices with the expert academic staff in the field and provide multi-sector, field service with the experts and scientists who can lead creative, universal child development policies related to ethical values.

Vision:

The vision is be a respected and preferred, leading, interdisciplinary program within the concept of child development in national and international level.
